Year: The year in which the training sessions were attended.
Quarter: The quarter of the year in which the training sessions were attended.
Training_Subject: The subject or topic of the training session attended.
Platform: The platform for which the training was relevant. In this case, the platform is MediConn’s platform vulnerability monitoring tools.
Role: The role of the employee who attended the training session. In this case, the role is cybersecurity specialist.
Sessions_Attended: The number of training sessions attended by the employee during the specified time period.
